description: Apply a world.state-driven value to a named behavior PARAM across EVERY entity carrying a tag — the shared/global counterpart to the entity-self scale-by-state. Generalizes the hand-rolled 'restamp every tower's range/cooldown on each upgrade' pattern into data. Per modifier the value is base (world.state[from], or a $cfg `base`) optionally scaled by the difficulty factor 1+perLevel*(level-1), multiplied by world.state[multKey], and clamped to [min,max], then written each tick to `param` on the tagged entities' matching behaviors. Self-healing: freshly-spawned entities and live upgrades propagate with no event wiring.

modifiers.description: Array of { tag, param, behavior?, from?, base?, levelKey?, perLevel?, multKey?, min?, max? } — each writes one behavior param across all tagged entities. Numeric leaves (base/perLevel/min/max) must be $cfg refs.
